programs.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programs.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl. With a little nudging from the matchmaking daughter, Sophie and Michael unexpectedly start to fall in love and Sophie must decide between returning home or following her heart.

programs.title: Charade
programs.desc: Romance and intrigue ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want to get their hands on a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. She soon loses trust in those who claim they want to help her.

programs.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programs.desc: After a rich Edwardian widow impulsively marries a handsome but poor Tuscan dentist and dies in childbirth, her English in-laws try to gain custody of the baby.

programs.title: Twist Of Fate
programs.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programs.title: A Killer in My Home
programs.desc: Allison Winters' world falls apart when her husband dies of a sudden heart attack, announcing on his death bed that he has a secret family. Six months later such family arrive on Allison's doorstep, determined to be a part of her life.

programs.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programs.desc: When a star-struck teenager with a desire to make it as a pop star disappears, her concerned single mom sets out to rescue her from the controlling singer who lured her to a faraway island with promises of fame and fortune.
